prompt: Logo wordmark on solid black background inspired by NoGood agency branding. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single line, all uppercase. The typeface is a custom blocky geometric sans-serif with extremely heavy weight — each letter is constructed from thick rectangular blocks with sharp 90-degree corners, no rounded edges anywhere. The letters have a slightly condensed proportion with minimal internal counter space. All text is solid medium gray (#8A8A8A) on pure black (#000000) background — NOT white, specifically a muted warm gray tone. The period/dot at the end is electric cyan (#00E3FF). Very tight letter-spacing between characters, letters almost touching. The overall aesthetic is industrial, bold, architectural — like concrete blocks forming letters. No icon, no symbol, no graphic element, no tagline. Pure heavy typography only. The text sits perfectly centered horizontally and vertically on the canvas. Vector quality, perfectly crisp edges, completely flat design with zero gradients or shadows.
